english: Where do I have to go?
choicesEnglish: Where do I have to go?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una domanda classica quando si è persi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi la tua destinazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A classic question when lost.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for your destination.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Il primo passo per la navigazione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa digitare dove vuoi andare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The first step for navigation.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means typing where you want to go.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Usare la mappa per trovare servizi vicini.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, stai cercando un posto dove mangiare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Using the map to find nearby services.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are looking for a place to eat.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere la posizione di un negozio.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi un negozio di alimentari.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Asking for the location of a shop.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for a grocery store.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Far partire le indicazioni stradali.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa iniziare il percorso guidato.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Starting the road directions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means starting the guided route.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Scegliere la modalità camminata.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che vuoi andare a piedi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Choosing the walking mode.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates that you want to go on foot.

english: How much time does it take?
choicesEnglish: How much time does it take?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere la durata del viaggio.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi quanto tempo serve.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Asking for the duration of the trip.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking how much time is needed.

english: Is there a lot of traffic?
choicesEnglish: Is there a lot of traffic?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Verificare le condizioni stradali.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se ci sono troppe macchine.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Checking road conditions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if there are too many cars.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Un'indicazione di direzione base.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, devi andare verso destra.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! A basic direction instruction.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you must go to the right.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Non cambiare direzione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa proseguire senza girare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Do not change direction.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means to continue without turning.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Spesso usato alle rotonde.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla dell'uscita numero due.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Often used at roundabouts.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about exit number two.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quando non segui il percorso corretto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che sei sulla via errata.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! When you don't follow the correct route.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you are on the wrong way.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! L'app sta cercando un nuovo percorso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, l'app sta ricalcolando la strada.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The app is looking for a new route.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the app is recalculating the road.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Il telefono non sa dove sei.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non c'è ricezione satellitare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The phone doesn't know where you are.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means there is no satellite reception.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Utile quando non hai internet.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la mappa scaricata sul telefono.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Useful when you don't have internet.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the map downloaded on the phone.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Salvare i dati cartografici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa fare il download.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Saving cartographic data.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means downloading.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Un problema quando usi molto il GPS.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che manca energia.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! A problem when you use GPS a lot.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means energy is missing.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Hai raggiunto la meta.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica la fine del viaggio.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! You have reached your destination.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates the end of the trip.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Indica il lato dove si trova il posto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa dal lato sinistro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Indicates the side where the place is located.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means on the left side.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Gentilezza dopo aver ricevuto indicazioni.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, stai ringraziando.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Kindness after receiving directions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are thanking.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una strada veloce a più corsie.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla della grande arteria stradale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A fast multi-lane road.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about the major road artery.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Per non pagare le strade a pagamento.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa non passare dove si paga.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! So as not to pay for toll roads.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means not passing where you pay.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quando ci sono troppe macchine.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa traffico pesante.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! When there are too many cars.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means heavy traffic.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un imprevisto sulla strada.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla di uno scontro tra veicoli.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! An unexpected event on the road.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about a collision between vehicles.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Cantieri sulla carreggiata.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che stanno aggiustando la strada.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Construction sites on the roadway.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means they are fixing the road.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Chiedere la distanza fisica.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi la lontananza.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Asking for physical distance.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the distance.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Sei arrivato dove volevi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica la fine della navigazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! You arrived where you wanted.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates the end of navigation.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Comandi vocali per la sicurezza.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa parlare all'app.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Voice commands for safety.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means talking to the app.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Per sentire le indicazioni a voce.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, vuoi attivare il suono.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! To hear voice directions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want to activate the sound.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Cercare un posto per l'auto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi dove lasciare la macchina.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Searching for a place for the car.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for where to leave the car.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Ci vorrà molto tempo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che c'è molta strada.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It will take a lot of time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates there is a long way.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Esaminare la strada programmata.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa controllare il percorso.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Examining the planned road.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means checking the route.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Per risparmiare batteria.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa spegnere il display.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! To save battery.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means turning off the display.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un'unità di misura per brevi distanze.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla di metri.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A unit of measurement for short distances.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about meters.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Tornare indietro sulla stessa strada.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa cambiare senso di marcia.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Going back on the same road.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means changing direction of travel.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Togliere il suono delle indicazioni.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa silenziare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Removing the sound of directions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means to silence.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Ingrandire la mappa.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa ingrandire la visuale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Enlarge the map.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means to enlarge the view.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Stai per raggiungere la destinazione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che manca pochissimo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! You are about to reach the destination.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates that very little is left.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Per fare benzina o ricaricare l'auto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi carburante.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! To get gas or recharge the car.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for fuel.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Visuale con foto dal satellite.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la visuale realistica.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! View with satellite photos.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the realistic view.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedere informazioni sul percorso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi la strada programmata.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Asking for information about the route.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the planned road.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Una decisione sulla modalità di spostamento.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa camminare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! A decision on the mode of travel.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means walking.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Non servono più le indicazioni.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa chiudere la guida.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Directions are no longer needed.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means closing the guide.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Un modo di dire per dire che sei confuso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa essere smarriti.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! An idiom to say you are confused.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means being lost.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Far sapere agli altri dove sei.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa mandare le tue coordinate.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Letting others know where you are.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means sending your coordinates.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Per ritrovare il posto facilmente.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa salvare tra i preferiti.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! To find the place easily.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means saving among favorites.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere informazioni sui mezzi pubblici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi del bus o della metro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Asking for information on public transport.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the bus or metro.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Cerchi il punto di sosta del bus.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi dove fermarti.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! You're looking for the bus stop.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for where to stop.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quanto manca alla fine del percorso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è il tempo che resta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! How much is left until the end of the route.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the time that remains.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Il punto d'arrivo è dal lato destro.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che sei quasi arrivato a destra.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! The arrival point is on the right side.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you've almost arrived on the right.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La strada che richiede meno tempo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, scegli la via più rapida.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The road that takes the least time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you choose the quickest way.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Visualizzazione tridimensionale degli edifici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la visuale in tre dimensioni.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Three-dimensional visualization of buildings.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the three-dimensional view.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Fai quello che dice il navigatore.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa obbedire alle istruzioni.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Do what the navigator says.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means obeying the instructions.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Controllo della velocità in corso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla del rilevatore di velocità.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Speed control in progress.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about the speed detector.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Attenzione a non entrare senza permesso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la zona dove non tutti possono guidare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Be careful not to enter without permission.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the zone where not everyone can drive.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Una stradina molto piccola.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla di una via angusta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! A very small street.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about a narrow way.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Se non vuoi sentire le istruzioni.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa silenziare la guida vocale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! If you don't want to hear the instructions.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means muting the voice guidance.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Imposta il percorso per tornare a casa.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, la destinazione è la tua abitazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Set the route to return home.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the destination is your home.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Ricaricare la propria posizione GPS.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa rinfrescare le coordinate.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Reloading your own GPS position.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means refreshing the coordinates.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Fine del viaggio programmato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che sei giunto alla meta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! End of the planned trip.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates that you have reached the goal.
